mapper.select: SELECT A.HST_CD , A.HST_YR , A.HST_CNTS , A.SORT , A.USE_YN , A.DEL_YN FROM TB_COM_HST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.HST_YR DESC, A.SORT DESC
mapper.update:
INSERT INTO TB_COM_HST ( HST_CD , HST_YR , HST_CNTS , SORT , USE_YN , DEL_YN , CRE_USR_CD , CRE_DTM , UPD_USR_CD , UPD_DTM ) VALUES
( CASE WHEN #{rm.hstCd} IS NULL OR #{rm.hstCd} = '' THEN F_COM_UUID_PK() ELSE #{rm.hstCd} END , #{rm.hstYr} , #{rm.hstCnts} , #{rm.sort} , 'Y' , 'N' , #{ssnUsrCd} , SYSDATE() , #{ssnUsrCd} , SYSDATE() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE HST_YR = VALUES(HST_YR) , HST_CNTS = VALUES(HST_CNTS) , SORT = VALUES(SORT) , UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd} , UPD_DTM = SYSDATE()
UPDATE TB_COM_HST SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , USE_YN = 'N' , UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd} , UPD_DTM = SYSDATE() WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND HST_CD = #{hstCd}
